stories.title: Southeast Asia turns to nuclear as Iran war disrupts energy supplies
stories.description: Analysts say the Iran war energy crisis is also adding momentum to nuclear interest and action in the region.

stories.title: Iran rejects U.S. peace plan. And, jury finds Meta, Google to blame in addiction trial
stories.description: Iran rejects a U.S. proposal to end the war and counters with a different peace plan. And, a jury finds Meta and Google negligent in a trial over social media's harms.

stories.title: The U.S. and Iran are in 'indirect talks,' says intermediary Pakistan, as war rages on
stories.description: Pakistan's foreign minister said the country is relaying messages and that Iran is deliberating on a U.S. proposal. Israel says it killed the Iranian Revolutionary Guard's navy chief.

stories.title: State-of-the-art air defense systems have not been able to stop some Iranian missiles
stories.description: The U.S. and Israel say they've depleted most of Iran's missile arsenal, but its weapons — including controversial cluster munitions — are challenging even the most advanced air-defense systems.

stories.title: Sweden's top general says U.S. remains 'really important ally'
stories.description: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Sweden's chief of defense, Gen. Michael Claesson, about NATO, the wars in Ukraine and Iran, and Europe's relationship with the United States.

stories.title: Greetings from Turkey's border with Iran, where Iranians let loose on the dance floor
stories.description: Iranians escaping hardship and war are shaking it off to Persian, Arabic and Turkish tunes in this disco in eastern Turkey.

stories.title: Iran rejects Trump's proposal to end the war and lays out 5 conditions
stories.description: Iran says no to President Trump's ceasefire plan and publicized a counterproposal that includes war reparations and Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Trump's Iran strategy is to pursue two off-ramps at once
stories.description: The White House insists the president is dictating events, but even some Republicans are frustrated by mixed messaging about his war aims.

stories.title: Iran's rejection of US talks reflects deep mistrust
stories.description: This does not mean the door is shut, as Iran's tough stance may be more about setting conditions than rejecting diplomacy.

stories.title: Iran's foreign minister says there are no negotiations with US
stories.description: Trump says he is talking to "the right people" in Iran, but Tehran says no such negotiations are being held.

stories.title: 'There's no safety anymore': Palestinians warn of expanding West Bank settler violence
stories.description: There has been a surge of attacks by Israeli settlers on Palestinian villages across the occupied territory since the start of the Iran war.

stories.title: Small window open for US-Iran talks, but swift end to war still unlikely
stories.description: President Trump says the US is already dealing with a "top person" in Iran, but Tehran denies that any talks have begun.

stories.title: What Iranians make of the possibility of talks to end the war
stories.description: Some Iranians dismiss the possibility of talks to end the war, others worry a deal may leave the current leaders in place.

stories.title: Iran war shows norms of international conflicts have been overturned
stories.description: US threats against energy infrastructure, and Iran's retaliation on its Gulf neighbours, signal a clear change.

stories.title: A committed pharmacist and a homesick blogger – the Iranian civilians killed in the war
stories.description: The toll on civilians is mounting fast as the US-Israeli war on Iran continues.

stories.title: US' and Iran's options for ending war narrow the longer it goes on
stories.description: Iran shows no sign of climbdown, while air power alone cannot achieve the US' main goal.

stories.title: Israel to expand ground and air attacks against Hezbollah in Lebanon
stories.description: There are fears in Lebanon that Israel is preparing for a large-scale ground invasion.

stories.title: Trump at a crossroads as US weighs tough options in Iran
stories.description: Statements from President Trump that the war is almost over are not matching up with the reality on the ground.

stories.title: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?
stories.description: Conflict has spread across the Middle East since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran on 28 February.

stories.title: Why does the US have Iran's Kharg Island in its sights?
stories.description: The tiny island is home to one of the most critical pieces of Iran's energy infrastructure.

stories.title: 'You can't smell Nowruz in the air': Iran marks Persian new year under threat of strikes
stories.description: Iranians speak to the BBC about preparing for the Nowruz new year festival during the war.

stories.title: Total repression and air strikes bring unrelenting dread for Iranians
stories.description: Tehran residents tell the BBC they're caught between US-Israeli bombing and an Iranian regime trying to reassert its power.

stories.title: 'Tehran assumes war is behind them: Iran will not capitulate, Trump has it all wrong'
stories.description: Nadia Massih is pleased to welcome Danny Citrinowicz, Senior Researcher in the Iran and Shi'ite Axis Program at the Institute for National Security Studies. According to Citrinowicz, the trajectory of the war in Iran hinges not on battlefield dominance alone, but on competing per...

stories.title: Iran's chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz: Fertiliser supply chains under strain
stories.description: As tensions between the US, Israel and Iran choke the Strait of Hormuz, cutting global energy and fertiliser flows, markets face rising prices and food insecurity. We discuss the global fallout with Carlos Razo from the UN Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD), exploring t...

stories.title: Russia says report it is sending drones to Iran 'lies'
stories.description: The Kremlin said Thursday that a report in the Financial Times that it was close to completing a shipment of drones to Iran was "lies". Russia is a close ally of Iran, but denies having sent military aid to its partner since the United States and Israel began attacking the countr...

stories.title: Trump insists Iran operations 'extremely' ahead of schedule
stories.description: US President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Iran war was "extremely" ahead of schedule, as he pushed Tehran to make a deal at his first cabinet meeting since the conflict began nearly a month ago. As Tehran publicly rebuffed negotiations, Trump again cited the original timef...

stories.title: US claims 'strong signs' for deal with Iran
stories.description: Speaking at a cabinet meeting, the #Trump administration claimed there were strong signs a #deal could soon be reached with #Iran for a #ceasefire.

stories.title: G7 meets in France to mend rupture with US on Middle East war
stories.description: Foreign ministers from the G7 are attending a two-day meeting outside Paris from Thursday to narrow differences with the US on the Middle East war, while keeping other crises like Ukraine and Gaza high on the agenda. The meeting comes as US President Donald Trump says he is ready...

stories.title: REPLAY: US President Donald Trump holds cabinet meeting
stories.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday urged Iran to ​make a deal to end US and Israeli bombing or face more strikes on their country. "They now have ​the ‌chance, that is Iran, to ⁠permanently abandon their nuclear ambitions and to join a new ‌path forward," Trump said during a Cabi...

stories.title: Iraq caught between US and Iran, facing attacks from both warring sides & Iran-aligned actors within
stories.description: Oliver Farry is pleased to welcome Hayder Al-Shakeri, Research Fellow with the MENA programme at Chatham House. Al-Shakeri describes Iraq as a state navigating a precarious balance between two powerful allies whose conflict is increasingly unfolding on its own territory. This pos...

stories.title: Iran, US harden positions as Tehran tightens grip on Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Iran and the United States appeared at an impasse Thursday, with each side hardening its position over talks and setting the stage for another potential escalation in the Middle East war. Thousands more US troops neared the region, while Tehran tightened its grip on the crucial S...

stories.title: War in the Mideast: Iranian cluster ballistic missiles test Israel’s defences
stories.description: As the regional conflict between Israel and Iran enters a volatile new phase, a banned weapon of war is reappearing over civilian centers. While Israel’s defence systems remain robust, a new threat – the cluster ballistic missile – is testing the limits of safety. Unlike a single...

stories.title: Pentagon boss claims Iran now has ‘no navy, no navy leader’
stories.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has said that Iran war is 'stuff for the history books'.

stories.title: Trump says Iran ‘lousy fighters but great negotiators’
stories.description: President Trump has said Iran is “begging to make a deal”, describing them as “lousy fighters but great negotiators".

stories.title: Tehran’s’tollbooth’: How Iran picks who to let through Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Iran has blocked the passage of vessels carrying 20 percent of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas supplies.

stories.title: Pakistan says it is mediating US-Iran talks
stories.description: Pakistan says it is mediating indirect talks between the US and Iran aimed at ending the war.

stories.title: Russian officials meet US counterparts as Moscow denies aiding Iran
stories.description: Kremlin spokesperson says talks are part of '​necessary dialogue' with Washington as war in Ukraine continues.

stories.title: Iranian naval chief killed in attack, Israel says
stories.description: Israel says it has killed IRGC naval commander Alireza Tangsiri in a strike near Bandar Abbas by the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Damage in Israel from Iranian attacks
stories.description: Video shows the aftermath of Iranian attacks in several cities across Israel.

stories.title: Is Europe heading to an energy crisis?
stories.description: Europe is bracing for a supply crunch and a price shock as the Iran conflict drags on.

stories.title: Video: GCC chief says Iran charging for ships to pass Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: GCC Secretary-General Jasem al-Budaiwi has accused Iran of imposing fees for ships to pass via the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: As a Palestinian, I stand in solidarity with the Iranian people. Here’s why
stories.description: History teaches us that the West's promises of caring for our 'freedoms' are empty because imperialism wants control.

stories.title: Iran to Lebanon: Four million people displaced by US-Israeli war
stories.description: Three million Iranians and at least a million Lebanese have been forced from their homes because of US-Israeli attacks.

stories.title: Germany warns of world economic ‘catastrophe’; OECD cuts UK growth forecast
stories.description: European powers and bodies warn of economic collapse as the war on Iran nears one-month mark.

stories.title: Iranian naval commander Alireza Tangsiri killed in attack, Israel says
stories.description: Defence minister claims Israel has killed Alireza Tangsiri, citing his role in blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Zelensky to ink air security deal with Saudi Arabia on surprise visit, says source
stories.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Saudi Arabia on Thursday for an unannounced visit, as the war in Iran spurs interest among Gulf countries in Ukrainian arms technology. The two countries are set to sign an agreement on “security cooperation — in particular, the p...

stories.title: 4th Pakistani national killed in UAE due to ‘falling debris’ from missile interception
stories.description: Another Pakistani national died due to “falling debris” from missile interception in Abu Dhabi in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) on Thursday, the Abu Dhabi Media Office said. The development takes the total number of Pakistani nationals killed in the UAE as a result of falling de...

stories.title: Trump plans May visit to China for talks with Xi after Iran war delay
stories.description: United States President Donald Trump will meet Chinese President Xi Jinping in May during his first visit to China in eight years, a closely watched trip postponed due to the ongoing Iran war. Trump’s effort to reschedule the trip reflected the Republican president’s eagerness to...

stories.title: Israel strikes Iran as Trump says Tehran wants deal to end war
stories.description: Israel launched strikes across Iran on Thursday, hours after US President Donald Trump said Tehran wanted a deal to end the nearly four-week war despite its top diplomat rejecting any talks with Washington. The conflict has mushroomed to draw in nations around the Middle East, se...

stories.title: UK authorises military to board Russian shadow fleet tankers
stories.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said on Wednesday he has given the military permission to board and detain Russian ships his government alleges are part of a network of vessels that enables Moscow to export oil despite Western sanctions. The decision comes as other European n...

stories.title: Lebanon must not become next Gaza, says UN chief
stories.description: • Guterres warns war in Middle East is ‘out of control’; calls for immediate halt to hostilities between Israel, Hezbollah• Israeli strikes kill nine more in Beirut, southern areas• Spanish PM Pedro Sanchez condemns US-Israeli actions UNITED NATIONS: UN Secretary-General Antonio ...

stories.title: Tehran promised eight oil tankers to Washington — Trump
stories.description: According to the US leader, they are Pakistani flagged

stories.title: US envoy says Iran has no alternative to US peace proposal
stories.description: According to Steve Witkoff, Iran "is looking for an off ramp following" US President Donald Trump’s "powerful" ultimatum regarding the Strait of Hormuz

stories.title: US to continue striking Iran despite contacts — US leader
stories.description: At the moment, Iran has the chance to permanently abandon their nuclear ambitions and to join a new path forward, Donald Trump said

stories.title: Kallas calls on US to withdraw from war with Iran, renew support for war in Ukraine
stories.description: The EU top diplomat emphasized that the rise in oil prices resulting from the war allegedly strengthened Russia while negatively impacting Ukraine’s situation

stories.title: Arab states to support escalation against Iran if it refuses to make concessions — WP
stories.description: According to the newspaper, Abu Dhabi and Riyadh favor a "decisive end" to the war through military or diplomatic means

stories.title: US servicemen in Middle East relocated from damaged bases to hotels — NYT
stories.description: Military sources indicated that this situation reflects a miscalculation on the part of the US administration about how Iran would respond

stories.title: Iran betting on survival as crucial factor in conflict — expert
stories.description: Ahmed Mustafa noted that Iran had managed to preserve key elements of its military architecture

stories.title: Pentagon developing four scenarios for military escalation with Iran — news outlet
stories.description: Axios noted that US servicemen had prepared a plan for a ground operation deep inside Iran aimed at seizing highly enriched uranium located at nuclear facilities

stories.title: Egypt in talks with US, Iran on ending conflict — top diplomat
stories.description: According to Badr Abdelatty, Egypt is conveying messages along with Pakistan and Turkey
